subcodes.title: Words spoken at Hotel Schenley in Pittsburgh, 1912-05-07
subcodes.first_line: If one is fully cognizant of the reason for the incursion of disease and can determine the balance of elements
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگر مدخل امراض را بدانند و اعتدال عناصر را میزان گیرند در هر عنصری
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @four elements, @principle of balance; moderation; equilibrium
